allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''pdf-parse''\); console.log\(''type:'', typeof m\); console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\(''default:'', typeof m.default\)")
Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); const methods = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\).filter\(m => m !== ''constructor''\); console.log\(''methods:'', methods\);")

Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); const methods = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\).filter\(m => m != ''constructor''\); console.log\(''methods:'', methods\);")
Bash(node -e "const pdfParse = require\(''pdf-parse''\); console.log\(''type:'', typeof pdfParse\)")
